about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.p1: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. EliteTech DEV is a premier software development company founded with a vision to deliver world-class technology solutions.
about.p2: We specialize in desktop applications, web systems, mobile apps, and IoT modules — serving clients across multiple countries with a dedicated team of experienced engineers.
about.p3: Our commitment is to turn your ideas into reliable, scalable, and beautiful software products.
about.missionText: To deliver high-quality, innovative software solutions that empower businesses to grow and succeed.
about.visionText: To be the most trusted software development partner for businesses across Southeast Asia and beyond.

whyUs.item2Desc: We respect your timeline and deliver projects on schedule, every time.
whyUs.item3Desc: Our support team is always available to assist you whenever you need help.
